name: Mouse

aliases.name: Position
aliases.comment:
The position of the mouse relative to the whole document. So if you are
scrolled down a bunch, you are still getting a coordinate relative to the
very top left corner of the *whole* document.

values.name: clicks
values.comment: Subscribe to mouse clicks anywhere on screen.

values.name: downs
values.comment: Get a position whenever the user *presses* the mouse button.

values.name: moves
values.comment:
Subscribe to mouse moves anywhere on screen. It is best to unsubscribe if
you do not need these events. Otherwise you will handle a bunch of events for
no benefit.

values.name: position
values.comment: The decoder used to extract a `Position` from a JavaScript mouse event.

values.name: ups
values.comment: Get a position whenever the user *releases* the mouse button.
